300],[302,517,1776530644312],[301,516,1776530644328],[300,515,1776530644341],[299,514,1776530644363],[298,513,1776530644387],[297,512,1776530644398],[296,511,1776530644420],[296,510,1776530644432],[295,510,1776530644448],[295,510,1776530644548],[296,510,1776530644566],[299,511,1776530644582],[306,512,1776530644594],[316,513,1776530644605],[326,513,1776530644619],[336,513,1776530644630],[343,513,1776530644643],[346,513,1776530644658],[347,513,1776530644676],[348,512,1776530644690],[349,512,1776530644699],[350,512,1776530644713],[351,511,1776530644722],[352,510,1776530644732],[354,510,1776530644740],[355,509,1776530644755],[356,509,1776530644764],[357,509,1776530644778],[357,510,1776530644804],[358,510,1776530644820],[359,510,1776530644828],[360,511,1776530644856],[361,511,1776530644864],[362,511,1776530644890],[363,512,1776530644913]],"mm-mp":18.309677419354838,"md":[[357,510,1776530644768]],"md-mp":3911.5,"mu":[[357,510,1776530644914]],"mu-mp":3929.5},"v":1,"tc":{}}
